items.title: Victor Wembanyama in the 2026 Western Conference Finals:
items.author: Justin Kubatko
items.body_excerpt:
Victor Wembanyama in the 2026 Western Conference Finals:

✅ 27.3 PPG
✅ 10.9 RPG
✅ 2.7 BPG

At 22 years old, he's the youngest player in NBA history to average at least 25 PPG and 10 RPG in a conference or division finals series.

Read, share, subscribe ⬇️
open.substack.com/pub/statitud...

items.title: Hollander POTD Billy Ray Bates. Drafted 47th in 78 from KY St but didn't make NBA til 80 w/POR. Gave team boost as explosive scorer. Was immortalized in Halberstam's "Breaks of the Game." Stalled out due to personal issues. Played in Philippines thru 88. Legendary character.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Billy Ray Bates. Drafted 47th in 78 from KY St but didn't make NBA til 80 w/POR. Gave team boost as explosive scorer. Was immortalized in Halberstam's "Breaks of the Game." Stalled out due to personal issues. Played in Philippines thru 88. Legendary character.

Victor Wembanyama (2026, San Antonio)
Elgin Baylor (1959, Minneapolis)

Phenomenal.

items.title: Keldon scored 8 of his 11 points in the 4Q in a true pounding the rock series for the seventh-year forward.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Keldon scored 8 of his 11 points in the 4Q in a true pounding the rock series for the seventh-year forward.

"It's been a hard playoffs for me," he said. "There's no denying that, but it makes it all worth it when you have big moments like this in Game 7."
